libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set nativeTest runtime arguments for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 to include -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use WebClient against an in-process Vert.x HttpServer for GET/POST, JSON, form/multipart, streaming, redirects, sessions, and caching; no external service is required. Do not add io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 unless the generated tests intentionally exercise OAuth2WebClient.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 build.gradle gates the Netty Java 25 native runtime properties only on libraryVersion == '5.0.0', so running the same scaffold with GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1 can miss them.

OAuth2WebClient is present in the artifact but depends on optional Vert.x auth OAuth2 types; covering that feature would require extra dependency setup, but it is not necessary for meaningful baseline web-client coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; 5.0.1 resolves through Vert.x Core to Netty 4.2.2.Final, so native-image runtime tests on Java 25 need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for the 5.0.0 scaffold.
